trigger.description: An agent has fewer than the configured cold-start threshold of outcome events for the current workspace, so per-agent profile rows are reported but no ranking bias is applied.
setup_commands: ee remember --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule "Profile cold-start fixture." --json

expected_emission.repair_contains: Record enough high-quality outcomes before relying on profile bias.
repair_strings: Use the unbiased ranking until the profile reaches the cold-start threshold.
Record real helpful or harmful outcomes from completed work before expecting profile bias.
